brand.name: WebNest Studio
brand.positioning: A small local web design & development studio that builds clean, modern, hand-coded websites for businesses.

contact.best_next_step: Use the Contact form on the site or email me to request a custom quote.

services: Maintenance & Support (updates and help after launch)

typical_steps: Quick chat about goals, pages, and style

faq.a: WebNest Studio builds custom websites for businesses: website design, business websites (multi-page), landing pages, and maintenance/support.
I’m based in Valencia City, Bukidnon, Philippines.

faq.q: Do you use templates or page builders?
faq.a: I focus on clean, custom, hand-coded builds (no recycled templates).

faq.q: How much does a website cost?
faq.a: I provide custom quotes based on scope, pages, features, and timeline. Share your project details through the Contact form or by email, and I’ll prepare a clear proposal.

faq.q: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a: Timelines vary by scope (pages and features). If you message me your requirements, I’ll give you an estimated schedule and milestones.
You can reach me through the Contact form on this page or email me directly at webneststudiobkdn@gmail.com.

faq.q: Can you give me exact pricing right now?
faq.a: I do not publish fixed package prices because each build is custom. Share your requirements, and I’ll send a tailored quote via the Contact form or email.

faq.q: What should I include when asking for a quote?
faq.a: Please include your business type, target audience, preferred number of pages, key features, design references, and target launch date so I can scope accurately.

faq.q: Do you work with clients outside Valencia City?
faq.a: Yes. While I am based in Valencia City, Bukidnon, I can work remotely with clients in other locations.
I focus on clean, modern, hand-coded websites with clear communication, practical timelines, and work tailored to each business.
After launch, I can continue with maintenance and support for updates, minor changes, and technical assistance as needed.

faq.q: What do you need from me to start?
faq.a: A short description of your business, the pages you want, any examples you like, your logo/brand colors (if available), and your target launch date.

safety.scope: This chatbot is a simple site guide for WebNest Studio. It should answer only about the studio, services, projects shown here, and contact details.
safety.privacy_note: Visitors should not share passwords, API keys, or other sensitive personal information.
